channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Having issues with macOS Sequoia pop-ups? Apple is working on it but there’s a fix now
item.description: macOS Sequoia users are dealing with yet another problem, this time being buried under endless pop-up notifications.
item.dc:creator: allisa.james@futurenet.com (Allisa James), TechRadar

item.title: Alabama man arrested in SEC social media account hack that led the price of bitcoin to spike
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — An Alabama man was arrested Thursday for his alleged role in the January hack of a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission social media account that led the price of bitcoin to spike, the Justice Department said. Eric Council Jr.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Netflix's subscriber growth is slowing, but its profit and stock price are still surging
item.description: Netflix says its subscriber growth slowed dramatically during the summer, a sign that the huge gains from the video-streaming service’s crackdown on freeloading viewers is tapering off.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Scientists show how sperm and egg come together like a key in a lock
item.description: Scientists have pinpointed how sperm and egg fuse together across the animal kingdom, from fish to people.
item.dc:creator: Laura Ungar, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Hit the lights: Mets outfit Citi Field for electric light shows
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Mets are lighting up Citi Field, even before their batters step up to the plate. About 70 front-office staffers scattered around the ballpark for over five hours to install 3,500 strips of LED lights on each railing ahead of New York's first home postseason game.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: The Internet Archive is even more essential than I realized
item.description: It never dawned on me that I might be insufficiently grateful for the Internet Archive. For many years, I’ve used it on something close to a daily basis, including to research numerous articles I couldn’t have written otherwise.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: SpaceX sues California regulators over rejected launches, claiming political bias
item.description: SpaceX filed a lawsuit against a California commission Tuesday, accusing members of political bias after they rejected the aerospace company’s request to allow more rocket launches from an air base in the state.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: AI isn’t really that smart yet, Apple researchers warn
item.description: While we wait for the Age Of Apple Intelligence, it may be worth considering a recent Apple research study that exposes critical weaknesses in existing artificial intelligence models.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump promotes family’s cryptocurrency tokens
item.description: Former President Trump touted his family’s new cryptocurrency tokens, encouraging users to “embrace this incredible technology” in a video message Tuesday. The WLFI tokens, released Tuesday morning, are part of the Trump family’s new crypto endeavor, World Liberty Financial.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: SpaceX blasts past 100 launches in 2024 with 101st from California
item.description: The aerospace titan does a lot of heavy lifting — and it's hard to believe that the aerospace giant has already launched more that 100 rockets this year alone.
item.dc:creator: Los Angeles Daily News, The Mercury News

item.title: Mexico says foreign firms have pledged $20 billion in investments, but many are old or uncertain
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexican officials announced Tuesday what they claimed was $20 billion in new foreign direct investment in Mexico, but much of that was neither new, nor completely certain.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Netskope extends data security with Dasera acquisition
item.description: Netskope today announced it has broadened its data protection capabilities by integrating data security posture management (DSPM) technology into its Netskope One Platform via its acquisition of Dasera.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Countries that have cashed in on their top-level domain names
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Anguilla is raking in extra revenue from registration fees for its .ai web domain thanks to the artificial intelligence boom, but it's not the only place cashing in on demand for websites with distinctive address endings.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: How to choose a flexible unified SASE solution
item.description: SASE is at the top of all CIOs’ minds, and for good reason. When deployed properly, SASE, which combines SD-WAN with cloud-delivered security via SSE, enables all users and devices, regardless of location, to securely access an organization’s hybrid network.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cato Networks extends SASE platform with digital experience monitoring
item.description: Cato Networks today introduced digital experience monitoring (DEM) capabilities that will augment the company’s cloud SASE platform with application traffic and network performance data that IT operations teams need to optimize end-user experiences.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Voter beware: Text scam targets you, no matter where you live
item.description: Reports warn of a scam text falsely claiming that recipients aren’t registered to vote. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals what you need to know and five tips to avoid such schemes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How Ernst & Young’s AI platform is ‘radically’ reshaping operations
item.description: Multinational consultancy Ernst & Young (EY) said generative AI (genAI) is “radically reshaping” the way it operates, and the company boasts a 96% adoption rate of the technology by employees. After spending $1.4 billion on a customized generative AI platform called EY.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: At the mercy of social media
item.description: I like Instagram as much as the next guy. I check in daily on my carefully curated feed of folks I follow and then work hard not to doomscroll the day away. One of my favorite follows is an adorable Corgi (aren’t they all adorable?) named Parsnip.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: HUD aims to tackle AI skills gap with new assessment approach
item.description: A new skills benchmark model at HUD will assess where employees are in their understanding of AI and recommend a personalized path for training and development. The post HUD aims to tackle AI skills gap with new assessment approach first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Drew Friedman, Federal News Network

item.title: Adobe lets customers test Firefly AI video generator
item.description: Adobe’s AI model for video generation is now available in a limited beta, enabling users to create short video clips from text and image prompts.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Windows users are being tricked by sneaky malware scheme
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how security experts found new malware, Lumma Stealer, spreading via fake verification pages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI being used to run world’s first indoor vertical berry farm
item.description: First indoor vertical berry farm opens in Virginia, using AI to grow 4 million pounds annually. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson takes a closer look at the "growing" trend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Fake Jennifer Aniston bikini body ad
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk unveils Tesla's 'Cybercab' as stock sinks
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Tesla unveiled its long-awaited robotaxi at a Hollywood studio Thursday night, though fans of the electric vehicle maker will have to wait until at least 2026 before they are available. CEO Elon Musk pulled up to a stage at the Warner Bros.
item.dc:creator: TOM KRISHER and ALEX VEIGA, Associated Press, NewsNation
